title: Energetic British Puy Lentils Cornish Pasty
description: A tangy and crispy British dish featuring puy lentils, perfect as a quick and easy low-fat meal. Fold this delicious pastry to make a satisfying lunch or dinner.
instructions: In a large pot, bring the vegetable stock to a boil.
Add the onion, carrot, celery, leek, and red bell pepper, and cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the puy lentils and thyme, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook for 20 minutes.
In a separate pan, combine the flour, salt, and 100ml water to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes and roll it out to a thickness of 3mm.
Cut out circles of dough using a pastry cutter or a glass.
Spoon a portion of the lentil mixture onto one half of each circle, leaving a 1cm border.
Fold the other half of the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops with a little water and bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
